concepts_used.title: 熵权法
concepts_used.how_used: 采用熵权法确定综合评价模型中各指标的权重，基于数据离散程度客观赋权。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we adopted Entropy Weight Method to establish a comprehensive evaluation model based on model 1.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 使用最小二乘法（多项式拟合）优化边际替代函数曲线，拟合市场替代关系。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the marginal substitution function curve was optimized by using the least square method.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对综合评价模型进行灵敏度分析，验证模型可靠性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we use sensitivity analysis to demonstrate the reliability of the model.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 对指标数据进行无量纲化处理，消除量纲影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: data nondimensionalization and missing value processing.

concepts_used.title: 缺失值处理
concepts_used.how_used: 处理数据中的缺失值，确保数据完整性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: data nondimensionalization and missing value processing.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出5条模型假设，每条假设后附有合理性说明。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To simplify the problem, we make the following basic assumptions, each of which is properly justified.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion，包含摘要、引言、模型、结果、结论等部分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 Introduction ... 2 General Assumptions ... 3 The Development of Models ... 4 Impact of the BAN in the Airport ... 5 Estimated and Promotion of the BAN ... 6 Advantages and Disadvantages

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图展示问题1的求解流程，辅助理解模型结构。
